dice.sides_option: Number of sides on the dice (default: 6)
dice.title: 🎲 Dice Roll
dice.result: You rolled a **{result}** on a {sides}-sided dice!

joke.title: 😂 Random Joke
programming: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs!
A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks... 'Can I join you?'
Why do Java developers wear glasses? Because they don't C#!
There are only 10 types of people: those who understand binary and those who don't.
A programmer's wife: 'Buy bread. If they have eggs, buy a dozen.' He returns with 12 loaves.
Why did the developer go broke? Because he used up all his cache.
How many programmers does it take to change a light bulb? None, that's a hardware problem.
Why do programmers always mix up Halloween and Christmas? Because Oct 31 == Dec 25.
A good programmer looks both ways before crossing a one-way street.
I had a joke about recursion, but let me tell you a joke about recursion first.
dad: I'm afraid for the calendar. Its days are numbered.
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
I used to hate facial hair, but then it grew on me.
What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field!
I only know 25 letters of the alphabet. I don't know y.
What do you call cheese that isn't yours? Nacho cheese!
Why can't you give Elsa a balloon? Because she'll let it go.
I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
Did you hear about the guy who invented Lifesavers? He made a mint!
puns: I used to be a banker, but I lost interest.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
Time flies like an arrow. Fruit flies like a banana.
I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
I wondered why the baseball was getting bigger. Then it hit me.
I'm on a whiskey diet. I've lost three days already.
I used to think I was indecisive, but now I'm not so sure.
I told my doctor that I broke my arm in two places. He told me to stop going to those places.
The shovel was a ground-breaking invention.
I would tell you a construction pun, but I'm still working on it.
jokes: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field!
Why don't eggs tell jokes? They'd crack each other up!
What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta!
Why did the math book look so sad? Because it had too many problems!
What do you call a bear with no teeth? A gummy bear!
Why can't a bicycle stand up by itself? It's two tired!
What do you call a fish wearing a bowtie? Sofishticated!
Why did the cookie go to the doctor? Because it felt crumbly!
What's the best thing about Switzerland? I don't know, but the flag is a big plus!

panel.title: 💡 Suggestions
panel.description:
Have an idea to improve the server? We'd love to hear it!
Use `/suggest` to submit your suggestion.
panel.how_it_works_value:
1. Use `/suggest` to open the suggestion form
2. Fill in the title, description, category and priority
3. Your suggestion will appear here for the community to vote on
4. Staff will review suggestions and update their status
panel.voting_value:
👍 Upvote — 👎 Downvote — 🤷 Neutral

Vote on suggestions to help staff prioritize them.

notification.title: Suggestion Update
notification.description: Your suggestion **{title}** in **{server}** has been updated to: **{status}**

select.step1_description: Select a **category** that best fits your suggestion:
select.step2_description: Now select the **priority** of your suggestion:

guildCreate.title: Thanks for adding Korex!
guildCreate.description: Hi! I'm **Korex**, your new professional Discord bot.
guildCreate.getting_started:
🚀 **Getting started:**
• Use `/help` to see all available commands
• Configure the bot with `/setup` (admins only)
• Visit the web panel for advanced configuration
guildCreate.addons:
💎 **Available addons:**
Korex has premium addons to extend functionality:
• **Store** - Shop with real payments
• **Tickets** - Advanced support system
• **Staff** - Team management
• **Forms** - Custom forms
• **Analytics Pro** - Advanced analytics
• **AI Assistant** - Artificial intelligence assistant
• And more...

Need help? Join our support server!
guildCreate.footer: Korex v{version} - The Core of Your Community

verification.verified: ✅ You have been verified! You now have access to the server.
verification.role_not_found: ❌ The configured verification role was not found. Please contact an admin.
verification.no_permission: ❌ I do not have permission to assign that role.
verification.not_configured: ❌ Verification is not configured. Use /verification setup first.
verification.embed_desc_default: Click the button below to verify yourself and gain access to the server.
verification.cmd_setup_desc: Configure and deploy the verification gate
verification.cmd_setup_channel: Channel where the verification embed will be sent
verification.cmd_setup_role: Role to assign when a user verifies
verification.cmd_redeploy_desc: Resend the verification embed to the configured channel

music_pro.playlist_limit: This server has reached the 20 playlist limit
music_pro.playlist_track_limit: This playlist has reached the 200 track limit
music_pro.playlist_name_taken: A playlist with that name already exists
music_pro.history_empty: No playback history for this server
music_pro.history_position_invalid: That position does not exist in the history
music_pro.dj_role_not_found: That role is not configured as DJ
music_pro.dj_role_already: That role is already a DJ role
music_pro.dj_only_enabled: DJ-only mode enabled — only DJs can control music
music_pro.dj_no_permission: You need a DJ role to use this command
music_pro.247_enabled: 24/7 mode enabled — I will stay in {channel}
music_pro.generating: 🎵 Generating your music... This can take up to 2 minutes.
music_pro.generating_cover: 🎵 Creating your cover... This can take up to 2 minutes.
music_pro.generating_remix: 🎵 Creating your remix... This can take up to 2 minutes.
music_pro.ai_failed: ❌ Generation failed. Your quota has not been consumed. Try again.
music_pro.track_not_found: ❌ Could not find **{track}**. Try adding the artist name (e.g. "Katy Perry Firework") or use the optional `url` parameter with a direct audio link.
music_pro.ai_job_not_ready: This generation is not ready yet
music_pro.quota_no_subscription: ❌ This server does not have an active Music DJ IA subscription. Purchase the addon at korex.dev to use AI generation.
music_pro.quota_exhausted:
❌ Monthly AI quota exhausted ({used}/{limit} used).
Resets on **{date}**.
music_pro.quota_status:
🎵 AI Quota — {used}/{limit} generations used this month.
Resets on **{date}**.
music_pro.job_in_progress: ⏳ A generation is already in progress for this server. Please wait.
music_pro.cooldown_ai: ⏳ Wait {seconds}s before launching a new AI generation.
music_pro.not_premium: This command requires the **Music DJ IA** addon. Activate it at https://korex.dev/addons/music-pro
music_pro.quota_type_exhausted:
❌ Monthly limit for **/{type}** reached ({typeUsed}/{typeLimit}).
Global quota: {used}/{limit}. Resets on **{date}**.
music_pro.queue_full: ❌ The server queue is full! Maximum **{max}** songs. Wait for some to finish before adding more.
music_pro.track_too_long: ❌ This track exceeds the server's limit of **{max} seconds** ({duration}s). Ask an admin to adjust the limit with `/musicconfig limits`.
music_pro.voice_not_found: ❌ No voice found with that name. Try a different artist name.
